cover: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce API v64.0 Summer 26 Developer Upgrade Map'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'API v64.0'. Subtitle 'Composite, UI API, Agentforce 2.0, Data Cloud vector search, LWC native state'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Version Pinning with /services/data/v64.0 icon', 'Regression Tests with Composite API icon', 'Agentforce 2.0 Tool Contracts icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'RISKY UPGRADE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'CONTROLLED UPGRADE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const url = '/services/data/v61.0/query?q=' + soql; right column green border '// GOOD' code: const API_VERSION = 'v64.0'; const url = `/services/data/${API_VERSION}/composite`; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Pin versions', 'Smoke test integrations', 'Validate Agentforce actions'. Footer bar: 'Summer 26: upgrade deliberately, not blindly'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce API v64.0 Upgrade Risk Scan'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Find Version Risk Before You Upgrade'. Subtitle 'Hardcoded endpoints, brittle Composite API, weak agent contracts'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Apex Callouts with plug icon', 'Middleware Jobs with pipeline icon', 'Agentforce Actions with robot icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD VERSIONING' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD VERSIONING' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: String url = '/services/data/v61.0/query?q=' + soql; HttpRequest req = new HttpRequest(); req.setEndpoint(url); right column green border '// GOOD' code: String apiVersion = 'v64.0'; req.setEndpoint('callout:Salesforce_Self/services/data/' + apiVersion + '/composite'); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Search /services/data/v', 'Pin v64.0 centrally', 'Regression test payloads'. Footer bar: 'Do not find-and-replace API versions in production systems'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'API v64.0 Front-End and AI Data Boundaries'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Keep State, Logic, and Retrieval Separate'. Subtitle 'LWC native state, Apex services, Agentforce 2.0, Data Cloud vector search'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'UI State with browser icon', 'Business Logic with Apex icon', 'Trusted Retrieval with Data Cloud icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD CLIENT LOGIC' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD SERVICE LAYER' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: this.account.Discount__c = 25; await updateRecord({ fields: this.account }); right column green border '// GOOD' code: const result = await priceQuote({ accountId: this.recordId, apiVersion: 'v64.0' }); this.state.quote = result; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'UI state stays local', 'Apex owns rules', 'Agents reuse services'. Footer bar: 'Do not turn LWC state into a shadow database'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
